name: starcam
plate_scale_notes: OV5647 stock lens, 53.50 deg horizontal / 2592 px (official RPi figure). Heavy barrel distortion, not yet characterised.
pole_prior_notes: 2x2-binned coords (1296x972 frame) — pipeline-night's --pole-x/--pole-y defaults. NOT full-res pixels.
night_layout_notes: night/YYYY-MM-DD/HH/<epoch_ms>.npy raw Bayer from the Pi 1B; to-fits converts in place to .fits.fz; HHb/ siblings hold 2x2 binned frames.
processing_host_notes: Pi 1B cannot process on-host; all pipeline stages run on puppy where the NFS frames land.
s3_legacy_notes: Dual-publish target during transition — the live /starcam/* website pages read this bucket.
